scripts.ts:clone:check: npm run ts:clone:drift && npm run ts:clone:guard
scripts.build:systems:verify: npm run build:systems && npm run build:systems:smoke
scripts.ops:race-queue:hardening: npm run -s ops:package-manifest:check && npm run -s ops:command-registry:check && npm run -s ops:entrypoint-contract:check && npm run -s ops:dependency-boundary:check && npm run -s ops:state-tiering:check && npm run -s ops:path-contract:check && npm run -s ops:docs-surface:check && npm run -s ops:root-surface:check && npm run -s ops:legal-language:check && npm run -s ops:ci-workflow:check && npm run -s ops:ci-quality:check

name: openclaw
description: Personal automation and orchestration toolkit for macOS/Linux workflows.
